mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant_product (merchant_id, product_id, status, sort_order) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{productId}, #{status}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_product SET status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM merchant_product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merchant_product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_product SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND product_id = #{productId}
